name: golang-github-deckarep-golang-set-dev
title: golang-github-deckarep-golang-set-dev
summary: simple set type for the Go language
description:
simple set type for the Go language
The missing set collection for the Go language.
.
Coming from Python one of the things missing in Go is the superbly wonderful
set collection. This is an attempt to mimic the primary features of the set
from Python.
.
This package contains the source.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-deckarep-golang-set-dev because simple set type for the Go language.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-deckarep-golang-set-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-deckarep-golang-set-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-deckarep-golang-set-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
